Off Calendar May-10-2022 Continued To Jun-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi, via Zoom, for Thomas Lucas, Trustee.

Ms. Alavi reports of the issues causing delays in completing an accounting and advises that it doesn't appear to be complicated as it is just a matter of gathering information to file a petition which she anticipates as being a petition for final distribution with a request for distribution to the related Special Needs Trust.

The Future Accounting is continued to Jun-28-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Mar-22-2022 Continued To May-10-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi, via zoom, for Thomas Lucas, Trustee.

Ms. Alavi reports that both her client and accountant had been on vacation but that the schedules are currently being worked on and asks for a continuance of 45 days accordingly.

The Future Accounting is continued to May-10-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Maloney. Not reported.
